creator: feenberg@nber.org
text:
On Thu, 24 Sep 2009, Naram Qashat wrote:

I just ran portsnap to update the ports tree, and the date in the msvcrt 
Makefile changes to September 18th, 2009, which is only 6 days ago.

However, when I run make I get the same error message as before. Is there 
a difference between portsnap1.freebsd.org and the server you are 
consulting? Should I be updating from a different server?

In the Makefile I see:

   APIVERSION     3.13
   RUNTIMEVERSION 3.16

Is that right?

If I ftp tp ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/mingw I can see 
versions of w32api from 3.1 to 3.13, but no 3.16. There are 3.16 versions 
of some other files, but not that one. In any case, the Makefile is 
looking to find 3.13, and does find it, but then complains the checksum is 
wrong - perhaps because the checksum is for 3.16? I am out of my depth 
here.


Thank you
Daniel Feenberg
NBER
